---
title: Less.
date: '2025-03-13'
description: A Personal Exploration of Minimalism
categories:
- Creative
- Minimalism
image: featured.webp
image-alt: Less project exploring minimalism and personal philosophy
featured: true
---

[View Site](https://noahweidig.com/less){.nw-btn .nw-btn-primary target="_blank"}

A personal exploration of minimalism and its impact on well-being and lifestyle. Discover principles of intentional living and how reducing excess creates space for what matters.
